violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Maintain clear access to hand sink at all times to encourage proper hand washing.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. Recommend better ventilation in kitchen. Fryer smoke not removed from room as needed.
